name: BACARDÍ Lime
short_description: If an impromptu beach party had a flavour – BACARDÍ Lime would be it.
searchable_text: BACARDÍ Lime is a flavoured rum from BACARDÍ, crafted for bright, easygoing citrus character. It suggests an impromptu beach-party vibe, with zesty lime at the core and supporting tropical notes of pineapple and coconut. Designed for simple mixing, it works well splashed into a favorite beverage or built as a BACARDÍ Lime and soda for a refreshing, low-effort serve. Its flavor profile suits light, fruity cocktails and sunny, casual drinks, making it a strong choice for lime-forward serves, citrus mixers, and tropical cocktail use.
display_description: If an impromptu beach party had a flavour – BACARDÍ Lime would be it.
